title: L(e)jtia
description: Adds more tracking to an older Ledger version!
body:
# L(e)jtia - ![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/l(e)jtia)
Aims to track mostly everything ledger **doesn't** track in older versions!

Currently Added:
- Fluid Tracking
- Item Pickups
- Item Drops
- Player Inventory Additions
- Player Inventory Removals

## Added actions:
```
player-pickup
player-drop
inventory-add
inventory-remove
```
Fluid place & break counts under `block-place` & `block-break`
